name: Elias, the Desperate Survivor
lines: I hear my friends' voices from somewhere. But when I turn around... it's just the flesh of those corpses.
What's scarier than hunger is the way those things stare at me, waiting with their mouths open.
Is death the only way out of this hell? No, I can't give up yet.

friendly.greeting: A... human? Please, don't leave me alone. If we stay together, those things won't find it so easy to attack.
friendly.farewell: Be careful as you go. And whatever you do, don't step into the places where there's no light.

normal.greeting: Who's there? Are you with the Resistance? Or the Management? I don't care who you are, just don't hurt me.
normal.farewell: Survive. Someone has to be proof that humans actually existed in this nightmare.

hostile.greeting: Don't come any closer! You're one of them, aren't you? A monster come to flay my skin!
hostile.farewell: Get lost! I can't trust anyone. Disappear before this blade reaches you!

deathLine: I'm sorry... guys... in the end... I'm coming... to join you...
description: A civilian survivor who escaped the initial massacre at the vehicle depot. He is struggling to stay alive amidst extreme trauma and starvation.
encounter: Elias: (Cowering in a corner, brandishing a worn knife) Stay back! Get away! ...Wait, are you human? Please, tell me who I am. I feel like I'm losing my mind!
Elias: Everything changed after the Resistance messed with that corpse. My friends... they were turned into monster meat right before my eyes!
Elias: Can you hear it? That scratching behind the walls? They're just waiting for us to get weak. This iron door won't hold forever.
Elias: (Clutching a bloodstained food tin) This is my last ration. I have to keep them from coming in at least until I finish this.
Elias: The tracks leading out of here are severed. We've been abandoned. Those bastards at the top definitely plan to bury this entire depot!
